scenes.supernova_script: Narrator says: Supernova AI के साथ English सीखें, जो आपके level को समझे। [Learn English with Supernova AI, which understands your level.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the app's personalized learning approach by showing vocabulary progression from A1 to B2.
- Reassures the user that they can start at their own comfort level, reducing intimidation.
- Drives action with a clear, encouraging CTA to start practicing.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova AI के साथ English सीखें, जो आपके level के हिसाब से चले।

A1 Beginner
hello / hi / bye
name, age, country
yes / no / please / thank you
food, water, coffee
work, home, family

A2 Elementary
usually / sometimes
yesterday / tomorrow / now
can / can't / have to
I think / I guess
how much? / how many?

B1 Intermediate
I've been / I've done
kind of / really / actually
honestly / to be honest
depends / not sure
in my opinion / I agree / I disagree

B2 Upper Intermediate
finally / basically / obviously
figure out / deal with / run out of
confident / overwhelmed / disappointed
could have / should have / would have
make sense

आज ही Practice शुरू करें (START NOW)
